name: Zucchini and Tomatoes Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Trim the zucchini with a self-sharpening knife and cut into 3/8-to-1/2 inch thick slices using a Vario-slicer.
3. Arrange the zucchini slices in the DDB (dish of choice).
4. Season with salt and pepper, and brush with chicken broth.
5. Bake for 12 minutes, or until almost tender. Remove from oven but keep it on.
6. Place a slice of tomato on each zucchini slice.
7. Combine bread crumbs, grated Parmesan cheese, and basil in the Batter Bowl.
8. Return to oven and bake for 5-6 minutes, until crumbs are lightly browned.
Note: This can be done in one step, but the squash may not be soft when it is finished. Great for a show if they like zucchini.
